testcase.name: runScenario["Validate Nutrition products using Price and Brand filters", "Validating price and brand by filter functionality"](2)
testcase.system-out: 07:16:32.230 [TestNG-PoolService-1] INFO stepDefinitions.PriceBrandFilterStep - Title : Search | Nutrition 07:16:32.241 [TestNG-PoolService-1] INFO stepDefinitions.PriceBrandFilterStep - URL : https://www.decathlon.in/search?query=Nutrition&inStock=1&price=59-231 &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser applies the maximum price filter as &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"250"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.PriceBrandFilterStep.user_applies_the_maximum_price_filter_as(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m User verifies all displayed products have price less than or equal to {string} Price : ₹69 Price : ₹59 Price : ₹219 Price : ₹69 Price : ₹129 Price : ₹129 Price : ₹69 Price : ₹99 Price : ₹99 Price : ₹99 Price : ₹99 Price : ₹69 Price : ₹69 Price : ₹69 Price : ₹69 Price : ₹69 Price : ₹59 Price : ₹69 Price : ₹69 Price : ₹89 &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser verifies all displayed products have price less than or equal to &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"250"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.PriceBrandFilterStep.user_verifies_all_displayed_products_have_price_less_than_or_equal_to(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m 07:16:32.615 [TestNG-PoolService-1] INFO stepDefinitions.PriceBrandFilterStep - User selects the brand {string} &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser selects the brand &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Decathlon"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.PriceBrandFilterStep.user_selects_the_brand(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m User verifies all displayed products belong to brand {string} &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mUser verifies all displayed products belong to brand &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1m"Decathlon"&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.PriceBrandFilterStep.user_verifies_all_displayed_products_belong_to_brand(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[0m
